broader_questions.broader_question: Give me an overall Behavioral Health YoY financial trends dashboard

sub_questions.question: Total Behavioral Health paid trend by period
Behavioral Health NPV% trend by period
Behavioral Health unit cost (paid per line) trend by period
Behavioral Health edit rate (edits per 1000) trend by period

broader_questions.hints: Overall BH trends at aggregate level. Use behavioral_health_indicator = 1 for financial metrics. Period_label is the time axis.

broader_questions.broader_question: Show me Behavioral Health financial trends split by line of business

sub_questions.question: Behavioral Health paid by line of business over time
Behavioral Health NPV% by line of business
Behavioral Health unit cost by line of business over time
Share of Behavioral Health paid by line of business over time

broader_questions.hints: Same financial metrics as hct-b1 but split by line_of_business. Use behavioral_health_indicator = 1.

broader_questions.broader_question: Show me Behavioral Health spend share trend by product type

sub_questions.question: Share of Behavioral Health paid by product type over time
Total Behavioral Health paid by product type
Behavioral Health unit cost by product type over time
Behavioral Health edit rate by product type

broader_questions.hints: Cut financial metrics by product_type (Outpatient, Professional). Use behavioral_health_indicator = 1.

broader_questions.broader_question: Show me Behavioral Health utilization trends — overall and by line of business

sub_questions.question: Behavioral Health claims per 1000 members trend over time at overall level
Behavioral Health claims per 1000 members by line of business over time
Behavioral Health claims per 1000 members comparison across lines of business
Behavioral Health paid vs utilization by line of business

broader_questions.hints: Use behavioral_health_indicator_cm = '1'. Overall utilization uses level_of_detail = 'period'. LOB utilization uses level_of_detail = 'period_lob' for both claim and member counts.

broader_questions.broader_question: What are the Behavioral Health drivers by BETOS subcategory — spend share, utilization and unit cost?

sub_questions.question: Share of Behavioral Health paid by top BETOS subcategory
Behavioral Health claims per 1000 members by top BETOS subcategory
Behavioral Health unit cost (paid per line) by top BETOS subcategory
Behavioral Health spend share trend by top BETOS subcategories over time

broader_questions.hints: Driver analysis at BETOS subcategory grain. Show top 10 subcategories by paid for period_indicator = 'P'. Financial metrics use behavioral_health_indicator = 1. Utilization uses behavioral_health_indicator_cm = '1' with level_of_detail = 'period_lob_prod_betos'. Member denominator at level_of_detail = 'period'.

broader_questions.broader_question: What are the Behavioral Health drivers by BETOS family — spend share, utilization and unit cost?

sub_questions.question: Share of Behavioral Health paid by top BETOS families
Behavioral Health claims per 1000 members by top BETOS families
Behavioral Health unit cost (paid per line) by top BETOS families
Behavioral Health spend share trend by top BETOS families over time

broader_questions.hints: Driver analysis at BETOS family grain. Show top 10 BETOS families by paid for period_indicator = 'P'. Same indicator rules as hct-b5.

broader_questions.broader_question: What are the Behavioral Health drivers by place of service — spend share, utilization and unit cost?

sub_questions.question: Share of Behavioral Health paid by top places of service
Behavioral Health claims per 1000 members by top places of service
Behavioral Health unit cost (paid per line) by top places of service
Behavioral Health spend share trend by top places of service over time

broader_questions.hints: Driver analysis at POS grain. Show top 10 places of service by paid for period_indicator = 'P'. Utilization uses level_of_detail = 'period_lob_prod_pos'. Member denominator at level_of_detail = 'period'.

broader_questions.broader_question: What are the Behavioral Health drivers by specialty — spend share, utilization and unit cost?

sub_questions.question: Share of Behavioral Health paid by top specialties
Behavioral Health claims per 1000 members by top specialties
Behavioral Health unit cost (paid per line) by top specialties
Behavioral Health spend share trend by top specialties over time

broader_questions.hints: Driver analysis at specialty grain. Show top 10 specialties by paid for period_indicator = 'P'. Utilization uses level_of_detail = 'period_lob_prod_spec'. Member denominator at level_of_detail = 'period'.

broader_questions.broader_question: What are the Behavioral Health drivers by ICD diagnostic group — spend share, utilization and unit cost?

sub_questions.question: Share of Behavioral Health paid by top ICD diagnostic groups
Behavioral Health claims per 1000 members by top ICD diagnostic groups
Behavioral Health unit cost (paid per line) by top ICD diagnostic groups
Behavioral Health spend share trend by top ICD diagnostic groups over time

broader_questions.hints: Driver analysis at ICD group grain. Show top 10 ICD diagnostic groups by paid for period_indicator = 'P'. Use icd1_grp_desc as the dimension. Same indicator rules apply.

broader_questions.broader_question: Show me the level of service (LOS) trend — are higher levels of service being billed more?

sub_questions.question: Percentage share of non-bypassed lines by level of service (LOS) over time as a stacked bar
Total non-bypassed lines by level of service over time
Paid per line (unit cost) by level of service over time

broader_questions.hints: Use los as the color/stacking dimension and period_label as the x-axis. Metric is SUM(non_bypassed_lines) per LOS / SUM(non_bypassed_lines) total. There are 5 LOS values. Use stacked_bar to show composition shift YoY. Apply any active filters (BH, LOB, etc.) as needed.

broader_questions.broader_question: Show me Behavioral Health psychotherapy duration trends — are longer sessions being billed more?

sub_questions.question: Percentage share of non-bypassed lines by BH psychotherapy duration group (30 min, 45 min, 60 min) over time as a stacked bar
Total non-bypassed lines by BH psychotherapy duration group over time
Paid per line (unit cost) by BH psychotherapy duration group over time
Total Behavioral Health paid by psychotherapy duration group over time

broader_questions.hints: BH does not have LOS mapping. Instead create duration groups from CPT codes: 30 min = cpt_code IN ('90832','90833'), 45 min = cpt_code IN ('90834','90836'), 60 min = cpt_code IN ('90837','90838'). Use CASE WHEN to build the duration_group dimension. Filter behavioral_health_indicator = 1. Stacked bar shows % share of non_bypassed_lines by duration group over period_label.

broader_questions.broader_question: What are the Behavioral Health drivers by CPT code — spend share, utilization and unit cost?

sub_questions.question: Share of Behavioral Health paid by top CPT codes
Behavioral Health claims per 1000 members by top CPT codes
Behavioral Health unit cost (paid per line) by top CPT codes
Behavioral Health spend share trend by top CPT codes over time

broader_questions.hints: Driver analysis at CPT code grain. Show top 10 CPT codes by paid for period_indicator = 'P'. Financial metrics use behavioral_health_indicator = 1. Utilization uses behavioral_health_indicator_cm = '1' with level_of_detail = 'period_lob_prod_cpt'. Member denominator at level_of_detail = 'period'.
